overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a scenic natural landscape. The character traverses open grasslands with distinctive red vegetation, approaches a massive rock formation, and enters a dense forest area in a continuous exploration sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with red vegetation patches and distant rock formation

events.description: mechanical wreckage becomes visible on the left hillside

agents.ego_description: running steadily through grassland toward the distant rock formation

entered.detail: massive gray stone mountain formation dominating the horizon ahead
dense patches of crimson red bushes scattered across the hillsides
tall thin trees with autumn foliage lining the distant hills
dark metallic debris and wreckage resting on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open grassland with distinctive red vegetation bushes scattered across rolling hills. The camera follows the character running toward a massive rock formation in the distance. Around the 10-second mark, mechanical wreckage becomes visible on the left hillside, adding a point of interest to the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to large stone formation with snow patches

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to rocky terrain with snow patches

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the mechanical wreckage and approaching the massive rock formation

entered.detail: uneven gray rocks and boulders covering the ground surface
white snow dusting the rocky ground and vegetation
dense line of trees marking the boundary of a forest area

segments.scene_description: The character moves through mixed terrain approaching the massive rock formation, which shifts from the center to the right of the frame. The mechanical wreckage is left behind as the ground transitions from grass to rocky terrain with patches of snow. A forest edge becomes visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with tall trees and undergrowth

events.description: entering dense forest area with tall trees and dappled lighting

agents.ego_description: running through dense forest, navigating between tall trees and overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: tall straight tree trunks with sparse autumn canopy creating a vertical forest structure
dense ferns and low vegetation covering the forest floor
white-barked trees with yellow autumn leaves

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dense forest with tall trees that partially obscure the sky, creating dappled lighting on the forest floor. The large rock formation and open terrain are left behind as the character runs through ferns and undergrowth. Birch trees with white bark appear on the left while the path continues deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open, vibrant grassland that gradually transitions into a dense, shaded forest. It begins by following the character across rolling hills dotted with distinctive red vegetation, moving toward a massive rock formation while passing mechanical wreckage on a hillside. As the character advances, the terrain shifts from grass to rocky ground with patches of snow, causing the rock formation to slide toward the right of the frame as a distant forest edge emerges. The scene then opens into a thick woodland where tall trees and ferns replace the open plains, creating dappled lighting on the forest floor. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the greenery, passing white-barked birch trees as the open landscape is completely left behind.
